content:
- Completed task 40 (ultra-high): migrated repo gates to only `make test` (regular) + `make test-long` (ultra-long-only).
- Makefile: introduced `ULTRA_LONG_TESTS` / `ULTRA_LONG_SKIP_ARGS`; `make test` now skips only `ha::e2e_multi_node::e2e_multi_node_stress_no_quorum_fencing_with_concurrent_sql`; removed redundant `--include-ignored` pass; `make test-long` now runs only ULTRA_LONG_TESTS with warning message.
- Repo text sweep: updated `.ralph/ralph-do-task.md`, `RUST_SYSTEM_HARNESS_PLAN.md`, all `.agents/skills/*` task templates, and a large number of `.ralph/tasks/**` to remove duplicated `make test` gate lists, fix drifted `make-test.log` duplicates, and replace legacy “BDD is a separate suite” wording with “BDD features pass (covered by `make test`).”.
- Ran gates (all green):
  - `CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 make check`
  - `CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 RUST_TEST_THREADS=1 make test` (twice)
  - `CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 make lint` (twice, once after test-long)
  - `CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 RUST_TEST_THREADS=1 make test-long` (no-quorum fencing finished ~200s)
- Noted pitfall: used `rg` with patterns containing markdown backticks inside double quotes; that triggered shell command substitution and accidentally ran `make test`. Added learnings to `AGENTS.md` (use single quotes; also rg here lacks PCRE2 so avoid `rg -P`).
- Ran `/bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh`, committed with required message, and pushed.
